name: What are big mistakes to avoid in a work injury claim?
description: Report fast, no insurer statements alone, follow medical—get lawyer.

mainEntity.name: What are big mistakes to avoid in a work injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report fast, no insurer statements alone, follow medical—get lawyer.
acceptedAnswer.description: Don't miss reporting deadlines, give recorded statements to adjusters, or skip doctor visits—these lead to denials. Key factors: Avoid social media posts showing activity; don't sign anything without review; follow all treatment. Document everything; let attorney handle insurer talks. Staying compliant speeds approval and higher settlements.
